ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion data entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence of movements */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch angle of the robotic movement */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the robotic movement */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll angle of the robotic movement */,
  "angle_amount" REAL /* Amount of angle change in the movement */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movement in seconds */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the movement occurred */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the robotic movement */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the robotic movement */,
  " jerk" REAL /* Jerk of the robotic movement */,
  "smoothing_factor" REAL /* Smoothing factor applied to the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sequence started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sequence ended */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the robot executing the sequence */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who initiated the sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., assembly, welding) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the sequence */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sequence (e.g., running, paused, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the robot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the robot (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance for the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the operator (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence executed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sequence started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sequence ended */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who executed the sequence */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sequence execution (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the motion data analyzed */,
  "avg_velocity" REAL /* Average velocity of the motion */,
  "max_acceleration" REAL /* Maximum acceleration of the motion */,
  "min_jerk" REAL /* Minimum jerk of the motion */,
  "smoothing_factor" REAL /* Smoothing factor applied to the motion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_analysis_motion_id FOREIGN KEY ("motion_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("motion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the robot calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "x_offset" REAL /* X-axis offset */,
  "y_offset" REAL /* Y-axis offset */,
  "z_offset" REAL /* Z-axis offset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robot_calibration_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operator_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operator_sessions_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)
